# backend/metrics/router.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-13T10:03:08Z

## Purpose
/api/v1/metrics + /metrics · Iter 31 · Prometheus exposition format.

Aggregates live counters from existing modules · returns text/plain in
Prometheus exposition format so Grafana / VictoriaMetrics / etc. can scrape.

Per §47.6 + §47.10 · this closes the "real Prometheus /metrics" gap.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter
- from `fastapi.responses` import PlainTextResponse

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_metric(name, value, labels, help_text)`: (no docstring)
- `_collect_lines()`: (no docstring)
- `metrics_versioned()`: (no docstring)
- `metrics_root()`: Standard Prometheus scrape path.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

- HITL queue size (live from DB)
- Build a fake request to call function · skip · use stats path instead
- Activity log size
- Comments + webhooks + jobs
- Feature flag count
